forecast.label: swap the sample deck for Mega Lucario ex, piloted by the heuristic
forecast.local_evidence: prior: the meta deck LOST to sample with the weak PIMC pilot; pilot now stronger but flat
forecast.proposition: the Mega Lucario ex deck piloted by the heuristic beats the heuristic+sample-deck baseline (648.1) on the ladder, by a margin the games can resolve

forecast.label: heuristic v5: attach energy toward the attacker nearest its attack cost
forecast.local_evidence: v4 = flat priorities {ATTACH:50,EVOLVE:48,…}; v5 adds energy-target shaping
forecast.proposition: heuristic v5 (energy-target attachment) beats heuristic v4 (648.1) on the ladder, by a margin the games can resolve

forecast.label: build a deeper ISMCTS (tree + rollouts) and pit it against the heuristic
forecast.local_evidence: dig + session: rule-based heuristics > search/RL/neural here; the pilot, not search depth, wins
forecast.proposition: a deeper ISMCTS (tree + rollouts) beats the heuristic v4 (648.1) on the ladder, by a margin the games can resolve
